title: Layer 5: Wild Signals
title_zh: 第五层：草蛇灰线——意外信号
desc: Grassroots clues — more reliable than headlines
desc_zh: 这些不在头条里，但比任何高级指标都准

mbsItinerary.threshold: More Beijing than DC visits = strategic drift
mbsItinerary.threshold_zh: 去北京多于华盛顿=战略偏移
mbsItinerary.note: MBS itinerary = world's most honest thermometer of alignment. Track next destination.
mbsItinerary.note_zh: MBS行程=世界上最诚实的温度计。追踪下一站去哪。

singaporeStance.threshold: Singapore picks a side = every other Asian ally is already doing it
singaporeStance.threshold_zh: 新加坡选边=其他亚洲盟友已经在做了
singaporeStance.note: Singapore is the honest thermometer — they pick a side before others do.
singaporeStance.note_zh: 新加坡是最诚实的温度计——它选边比别人都早。

adbLoanCurrency.threshold: Meaningful increase (>2%) = multilateral acceptance of RMB
adbLoanCurrency.threshold_zh: 显著增长(>2%)=多边机构对RMB的实质接受
adbLoanCurrency.note: Operational acceptance of RMB at multilateral level — slower but more real than SWIFT data
adbLoanCurrency.note_zh: 多边层面RMB的操作性接受——比SWIFT数据慢但更真实

hkmaInterventions.threshold: Sustained weak-side touches = capital outflow pressure from Asia
hkmaInterventions.threshold_zh: 持续触碰弱方=亚洲资本外流压力
hkmaInterventions.note: HKMA interventions = pressure gauge for capital flows from/to Asia
hkmaInterventions.note_zh: 金管局干预频率=亚洲资本流动的压力计

chinaGoldImportPath.threshold: Route change = settlement system de-dollarization in motion
chinaGoldImportPath.threshold_zh: 路径改变=结算体系去美元化在进行
chinaGoldImportPath.note: If China gold imports shift from London/Switzerland to direct Russia procurement, settlement currency changes too.
chinaGoldImportPath.note_zh: 如果中国黄金进口从伦敦/瑞士转向直接向俄采购，结算币种也在变。

pewFavorability.value_zh: 美国约62% · 中国约32%（全球中位数）
pewFavorability.threshold: Europe US favorability dropping sharply since Jan 2026
pewFavorability.threshold_zh: 欧洲对美国好感度自2026年1月起急剧下降
pewFavorability.note: US global approval declining under second Trump term. China stable-low but improving in Global South (Africa, SEA).
pewFavorability.note_zh: 特朗普第二任期内美国全球好感度下降。中国稳定低值但在全球南方（非洲、东南亚）有所改善。
